data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery state lifecycle requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery state lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any delivery rows or their corresponding states. The linked use case specifies the need for delivery rows per event, subscription, and channel, yet there is no evidence of such rows being created or validated in the prior steps. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of delivery rows per (event, subscription, channel) as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
